content.en:
The Void Heaven Temple, the Inner Sanctum.

This place can only be entered by the strong people with a high status in the Void Heaven Temple, and ordinary gods and powerhouses of the Heavenly Mandate are not qualified to enter here.

Without him, the status is a problem.

And although Ye Tian's strength is still relatively weak now, his status is very high, so he is qualified to enter here.

Here, Ye Tian met his other three senior brothers-

True Rain Heavenly Monarch, Storm Heavenly Monarch, Black Armor Heavenly Monarch.

Ye Tian didn't know much about the strength of these three Heavenly Monarchs, but he knew that Pengyu Heavenly Monarch was ranked eighteenth on the Heavenly Monarch List, which was definitely a very terrifying ranking.

And the True Rain Heavenly Monarch, the Storm Heavenly Monarch and the Black Armor Heavenly Monarch did not enter the Heavenly Monarch List, but their strength is definitely very strong.

"Senior brother, our Void Heaven Temple currently has a total of 76 Heavenly Monarchs and 273 Divine Generals, among which there are a total of two Heavenly Monarchs who have entered the Heavenly Monarch List, one of them is me, and the other is our senior nephew - Dark Light Heavenly Monarch!"

Peng Yu Tianjun introduced.

"Senior nephew?"

Ye Tian was surprised.

Peng Yu Tianjun explained: "Master Venerable has accepted many apprentices in the chaos, and some apprentices have even reached the Great Dao realm early, and even become the invincible true ancestor second only to the Dao Ancestor. Moreover, Shizun also has three Dao Ancestor apprentices, not even much weaker than Shizun. There were so many disciples, and some of them had also accepted disciples, and the master of the Dark Light Heavenly Monarch was a powerful True Ancestor. In terms of status, the Dark Light Heavenly Monarch is actually not weaker than us, although you are his uncle, you can't suppress him in the name of your uncle. According to our rules, let's communicate with each other!"

"Hmm!"

Ye Tian nodded.

It must be necessary to communicate with the peers of the Dark Light Heavenly Monarch, if it is all according to the generation, if he meets a true ancestor and nephew one day, will he dare to let people call him uncle?

In fact, in the chaos, among many forces, they are ranked according to their strength.

The Void Heaven is considered to be more respectful of the teacher, so he will have such a high status as Ye Tian, otherwise if he enters the Void Heaven Palace, who will bird him?

"Senior brothers, what is the situation in the Great Universe now, can you tell me?"

Ye Tian asked.

Peng Yu Tianjun said with a smile: "The situation in the Great Universe is very complicated now, the Ancestral Monument was born, which has aroused the greed of a large number of True Ancestors, and they all want to make this Great Universe a Dao Realm, so that they can come. However, the chaos was too big and too big to reach the Dao Ancestor level, and it was impossible to reach the true high level of chaos at all. The ancestral monument still affects only a small part of the area, after all, it takes a long time for many true ancestors to rush over, and those divine generals and heavenly monarchs who are too far away can't get here at all. In the chaos, Heavenly Monarchs like me, although they are top Heavenly Monarchs, they are more powerful than me, and even in our Void Heaven lineage, I can't rank in the top ten. "

"Shhh

Ye Tian gasped, truly realizing the power of Chaos, the strong are like rain!

"Senior brother, although you are an official disciple of Shizun, all resources and inheritance need to rely on yourself, and we can't provide it to you, which is also what Shizun means. However, some of the exercises and treasures of the Void Heaven Temple are all taken out by us, and if you want to exchange them, you can do so, but you must pay the same price. "

Pengyu Tianjun said.

"Senior brother, I understand!" Ye Tian nodded, and immediately looked at a few senior brothers, and then said, "Senior brother, do we have a method for cultivating extreme talents in the Void Heaven Palace?"

"Extreme Talent!" Peng Yu Tianjun looked at Ye Tian with some surprise, but he didn't expect Ye Tian to also know the extreme talent, "The method of extreme talent naturally exists, but you can only cultivate after stepping into the Heavenly Monarch, you are now a god general, and you can't cultivate." Moreover, the Extreme Talent Method is very precious and cannot be taught, and it must be returned to the Chaotic Void Heaven Realm before it can be learned. Or, if you get something that has been inherited from the Extreme Method, you can also learn it. But those inherited things are too precious, and I don't have them in me. "

Ye Tian was not too disappointed, he asked the Extreme Talent Method for his wife and sister, he naturally didn't need it, because he could copy the talent.

Now.

The talents of Peng Yu Tianjun and the others were all checked by him with copy talents, among which Peng Yu Tianjun had several extreme talents, but some of the extreme talents overlapped with Ye Tian.

In the end, Ye Tian copied the five non-overlapping extreme talents from several Heavenly Monarchs, and these five talents were-

Fire Spear Talent: God-level (Extreme)

【Water Talent: God-level (Extreme)】

【Water Dragon Talent: God Level (Extreme)】

【Earth Splitting Talent: God-level (Extreme)】

【Gold Slashing Talent: God-level (Extreme)】

Among the five talents, there are two water talents, which can be regarded as overlapping.

Ye Tian did not fuse on the spot, and was ready to fuse after leaving, otherwise it would be easy to arouse the suspicion of several senior brothers.

Moreover, Ye Tian found that among the several senior brothers, only Senior Brother Peng Yu had an origin talent, that is, the source speed talent.

As for the other senior brothers, they don't have the original talent.

From this, it can be seen that origin talents are very rare in chaos.

Ye Tian didn't ask about the origin talent, otherwise it would be too surprising, after all, this origin talent was definitely one of the top secrets, and he couldn't explain how he knew about it.

Therefore, he chose not to ask.

Senior Brother Peng Yu gave Ye Tian a brand, which was the identity symbol of the Void Heaven lineage, and after Ye Tian refined, he was connected to the Void Heaven Palace's machine spirit, and he could enter a virtual rule network.

Here, he can browse through various resources and, if selected, choose to trade.

"Dark Lin Crystal, which can refine the divine soul, is worth 300 divine coins!"

"A pair of horns of the Chaos Life Horned Beast, which can be used to refine weapons, worth 100 divine coins!"

"Quenching the divine liquid, used in refining the body, one is worth 500 divine coins!"

"Heavenly Mandate Pill, which can be used to break through the Heavenly Mandate Realm, is worth 5 Dao coins!"

......

When Ye Tian saw the usefulness of the treasures above, his eyes immediately lit up, and he couldn't wait to buy them all.

But alas, he has no money!

That's right, not a penny!

After all, he didn't have any god coins or dao coins at all.

At the beginning, Ye Tian didn't know about the Divine Currency and the Dao Coins, but after asking some disciples of the Void Heaven Palace, he knew about the Divine Coins and the Dao Coins.

One Dao coin is equal to 10,000 divine coins, of which Dao Coin is a currency that can only be refined by the True Ancestor of the Great Dao, which requires the strength of the Dao powerhouse and some rare materials, and is of high value.

And the Divine Currency is refined by the Heavenly Mandate True Monarch, but it is also more troublesome, a Heavenly Monarch can only refine 100 Divine Coins a year, plus the cost of materials, time, etc., in fact, it is really not cost-effective, so it is impossible for those powerful Heavenly Monarchs to refine the Divine Coin, and only some Celestial Monarchs who are hopeless in their advancement will often refine the Divine Coin.

Divine Coins and Dao Coins are very useful, not only as currency, but also as cultivation resources.

For example, the Divine Coin, which can be used to restore divine power, can also improve cultivation, and the Dao Currency is even more useful, some rule injuries can be repaired with the Dao Coin, and you can also refer to the little rule power mixed in the Dao Coin.

"Let's exchange some divine coins first, in the future, the currency of the Great Universe God General level will definitely be divine coins, and I must exchange them for some divine coins to buy some resources and treasures!"

Ye Tian thought.
